name: Luc Durand
innate: is a Swiss-French master's student in electrical engineering at EPFL, known for his logical mindset and guarded nature. Growing up in Geneva, he developed a skeptical outlook and a preference for data-driven arguments. Luc speaks sparingly but precisely, often dissecting others' statements for flaws. Though not outwardly emotional, his quiet intensity can unnerve peers. He distrusts impulsivity and tests theories methodically, making him slower to accuse but relentless once convinced. In discussions, he listens more than he talks, but his rare interjections carry weight due to their calculated timing.
group_context: EPFL master's students from various majors
